segments.text: Alright, the play—landing on the platform first
segments.original_text: さあプレイですが一旦台に着地
全力を使ってきましたね

segments.text: Out of fuel in this spot
segments.original_text: この展開もう燃料がない

segments.text: Olimar's ledge getup really isn't strong, so...
segments.original_text: オリマーは崖上がり本当に強くないんで

full_text: Let's go! Big one! Alright, the play—landing on the platform first. They've gone all out! Recovery's getting rough. Out of fuel in this spot. Shuton's gassed! Olimar's ledge getup really isn't strong, so... Yeah

corrections.original: さあプレイですが一旦倍に着地
corrections.corrected: さあプレイですが一旦台に着地

corrections.rule: Player name correction: シュート→しゅーとん (Shuton)

corrections.original: 俺は崖上がり本当に強くないんで
corrections.corrected: オリマーは崖上がり本当に強くないんで
corrections.rule: Whisper mishearing: 俺は→オリマーは (character name)
